title: Annual Reports, Info Source and Completed Requests - Bank of Canada
content:
## Annual Reports, Info Source and Completed Requests
Last modified: June 2026
The ATIP Annual Reports are prepared pursuant to section 70(1)(d) of the Access to information Act (ATIA) and section 71(1)(e) of the Privacy Act and are tabled in the House of Commons.
Info Source is a series of publications containing information about the Government of Canada, its organization and information holdings including those of Crown Corporations such as the Bank of Canada. It is a key reference tool to assist members of the public in exercising their rights under the Access to Information Act and the Privacy Act .

## Completed ATIA Requests
Please note that the summaries reflect the wording that the applicants used, and that records released do not necessarily support or confirm the applicants' presentation of issues and facts in the summary. Also, the records exist only in the language in which they were created.
If you wish to obtain copies of the specific records released in response to a particular request, contact the Access to Information Office.
Note: The retention on records released in response to ATIA requests is 2 years.
